			Tree number:3695Species:Birch Tree Size (DBH):26Tree location:See site map Description of Tree:Metal tag/ white flagging tape Reason for Removal:OtherComments:Tree appears dead.
		
		
			Tree number:3696Species:Hardwood Tree Size (DBH):12Tree location:See site map Description of Tree:Metal tag/ white flagging tape Reason for Removal:OtherComments:Tree exhibits pronounced arched, bowed form with lean greater than 20 degrees. 			Tree number:3699Species:Maple Tree Size (DBH):23Tree location:See site map Description of Tree:Metal tag/ white flagging tape Reason for Removal:OtherComments:Large basal canker present with canopy tip dieback. Sounding suggests internal decay. Overall canopy decline observed.

			Tree number:3707Species:Black CherryTree Size (DBH):13Tree location:See site map Description of Tree:Metal tag/ white flagging tape Reason for Removal:OtherComments:Severe canopy dieback present throughout the crown. 			Tree number:3709Species:Sweetgum Tree Size (DBH):18Tree location:See site map Description of Tree:Metal tag/ white flagging tape Reason for Removal:OtherComments:Broken leader present. 			Tree number:3714Species:Poplar Tree Size (DBH):10Tree location:See site map Description of Tree:Metal tag/ white flagging tape Reason for Removal:OtherComments:Suppressed canopy due to adjacent maple. Leaders exhibit accordion-like growth with epicormic shoots dominating upper canopy.

			Tree number:3730Species:Poplar Tree Size (DBH):12Tree location:See site map Description of Tree:Metal tag/ white flagging tape Reason for Removal:OtherComments:Dogleged basal structure. The tree's main leader snapped off, resulting in loss of apical dominance, a low live crown ratio.
		
		
			Tree number:3637Species:Poplar Tree Size (DBH):31Tree location:See site map Description of Tree:Metal tag/ white flagging tape Reason for Removal:OtherComments:Exhibiting multiple older dead scaffold branches.
